commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=2fe869cb10d049c18fdb4765906042cc01d3e8a5)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a default-disabled structured Doctor lint check for `toolResultMaxChars` advice and tests default-disabled plus inherited-default behavior.

PR surface: Source +177, Tests +142. Total +319 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. From source inspection, the explicit per-agent branch still builds `agents.<id>.contextLimits.toolResultMaxChars` while current schema/help documents `agents.list[].contextLimits.toolResultMaxChars`.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can correct the structured per-agent path and update focused tests; the protected/draft PR still needs normal maintainer handling afterward.

target.title: Doctor: expose tool result cap findings
target.body:
## Summary- add default-disabled structured lint findings for `core/doctor/tool-result-cap`- map existing toolResultMaxChars advice into warning findings with stable path/target/fixHint metadata- keep legacy `openclaw doctor` note output as the authority for normal Doctor runs## Public contract- No public SDK, plugin manifest, config schema, or persisted data-model contract changes.- The structured check is opt-in via `defaultEnabled: false`; default `doctor --lint` skips it while `--all` and `--only core/doctor/tool-result-cap` include it.- No repair path is added.## Validation- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/flows/doctor-tool-result-cap-advice.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts --reporter=verbose` (56 tests)- `pnpm exec oxfmt --write src/flows/doctor-tool-result-cap-advice.ts src/flows/doctor-tool-result-cap-advice.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts`- `git diff --check`- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/flows/doctor-tool-result-cap-advice.ts src/flows/doctor-tool-result-cap-advice.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts`- `pnpm tsgo:core`- `OPENCLAW_CHECK_CHANGED_REMOTE_CHILD=1 OPENCLAW_CHANGED_LANES_RAW_SYNC=1 CI=1 pnpm check:changed`- `node scripts/plugin-sdk-surface-report.mjs --check`- `node scripts/check-plugin-sdk-exports.mjs`## Real behavior proofSource CLI proof with isolated `OPENCLAW_CONFIG_PATH` containing `agents.defaults.contextLimits.toolResultMaxChars = 16000`:- default `pnpm --silent openclaw doctor --lint --json`: `checksRun: 25`, `checksSkipped: 8`, `toolResultCapFindings: 0`- explicit `pnpm --silent openclaw doctor --lint --json --only core/doctor/tool-result-cap`: `checksRun: 1`, `checksSkipped: 32`, finding path `agents.defaults.contextLimits.toolResultMaxChars`, target `agents.defaults`, severity `warning`## Notes`pnpm check:changed` first tried to delegate to Blacksmith Testbox and was blocked by the local Crabbox binary version (`0.15.0`, requires `>=0.22.0`), so I ran the documented local child path directly with `OPENCLAW_CHECK_CHANGED_REMOTE_CHILD=1`.## Update: inherited default cap coverageAddressed ClawSweeper's P2 inherited-default finding at head `2fe869cb10d049c18fdb4765906042cc01d3e8a5`:- structured lint now includes configured agents when `agents.defaults.contextLimits.toolResultMaxChars` is set, matching the legacy Doctor target enumeration- inherited per-agent findings use path `agents.defaults.contextLimits.toolResultMaxChars` with the agent-specific target, e.g. `agents.writer`- added a focused regression where an agent inherits the defaults cap while using its own larger modelAdditional validation after the fix:- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/flows/doctor-tool-result-cap-advice.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts --reporter=verbose` (57 tests)- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts src/flows/doctor-tool-result-cap-advice.ts src/flows/doctor-tool-result-cap-advice.test.ts`- `pnpm tsgo:core`- `OPENCLAW_CHECK_CHANGED_REMOTE_CHILD=1 OPENCLAW_CHANGED_LANES_RAW_SYNC=1 CI=1 pnpm check:changed`- `node scripts/plugin-sdk-surface-report.mjs --check`- `git diff --check`
Update: agent path alignment

- Addressed ClawSweeper's P2 path-shape finding in `5f671c8904`.
- Explicit per-agent cap findings now use `agents.list.<id>.contextLimits.toolResultMaxChars` and `target: agents.list.<id>`.
- Inherited-default findings remain anchored to `agents.defaults.contextLimits.toolResultMaxChars` with per-agent targets.
- Validation after this update: focused Vitest 57 tests, changed-file oxlint, `pnpm tsgo:core`, local child `pnpm check:changed`, SDK surface report, and `git diff --check`.
